home.bio: Passionate about web development and emerging technologies, I design modern, high-performance, and accessible applications. Finishing my degree at the IUT of the University of Parakou, I combine academic rigor with hands-on practice to craft memorable digital experiences.

cv.profile_desc: Passionate Full Stack Developer with a strong background in management information systems. Specialized in modern technologies like Next.js, React, and Node.js, I strive to create high-performance and accessible web applications. My approach combines technical rigor and creativity to deliver innovative solutions that meet user needs.
